raw_consumer_statement:
This is a follow up with additional abuse by Barclays related to the claim # XXXX. 

Today I found another charge for {$63.00} pending from XXXX on my account which I closed! They have since sent me XXXX credit cards that I HAVE NOT ACTIVATED yet somehow this charge is pending on a card ending in XXXX. 

I saw that this account could be locked, so I locked it. This abuse has got to stop. How are cards being activated when I am NOT activating them?! All I want is my money refunded that was fraudulently charged on my account and to be done with Barclays. I never want to deal with this company again.
